purpose: Provide a private operator and TARS entry point for reprocessing or explicitly processing a registry item through memory-api /registry/process.
dependencies: Memory API Header Auth credential in n8n
Registry Webhook Header Auth credential in n8n
failureModes: missing or invalid registry secret header
notes: The background processing path is primarily initiated by REG-01 via memory-api background tasks.
REG-02 exists so operators and TARS can explicitly retry or reprocess a registry item without direct DB access.
